name: Spinach Puff Pastry
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Pillsbury frozen puff pastry sheet
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost the spinach and squeeze out excess water.
2. Sauté chopped onion and chillies until translucent.
3. Add the spinach to the pan, cover, and cook until it no longer has a raw taste. Turn off the stove and stir in the cream cheese. Allow mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Place a sheet of puff pastry on foil. Spread the spinach mixture evenly over the pastry. Cover with the remaining puff pastry sheet.
6. Cut into squares or diamonds, etc. Bake for about 40 minutes, or until the crust is light golden brown.
